reviews.comment:
No hay nada en su autoservicio. Faltan productos para consumo de almuerzo

(Translated by Google)
There's nothing at their drive-thru. They're missing lunch items.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXclBUOWpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bien los baños. Poco personal para la carga de combustible, estuve esperando cerca de 30 minutos. Nunca encuentro algo para comer en el servicompras, solo galletas y demás industrializados. Si le ponen más onda, la podrían romper.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were fine. There weren't enough staff at the gas station; I waited almost 30 minutes. I can never find anything to eat at the convenience store, just cookies and other processed snacks. If they put more effort into it, they could really make it great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXMklMaktBEAE

reviews.comment:
Falta de medios de pagos y no quieren cargar los puntos de serviclub

(Translated by Google)
Lack of payment methods and they refuse to credit Serviclub points

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion. El problema es que cuando hay mucho transito, se hacen filas muy largas.
Pero igual lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The problem is that when there's a lot of traffic, lines can form.
But I still recommend it.

reviews.comment:
El café más rico de toda la ruta 23 , un amor los empleados , hacer un break en ese lugar para seguir viaje , es la mejor opción , y los baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
The best coffee on all of Route 23, the staff are lovely, taking a break there before continuing your trip is the best option, and the bathrooms are spotless.
